author: tsubasa
name: 1xH100 Budget Run: SmearGate + BigramHash + MLP3x
blurb: Non-record submission exploring competitive results on 1xH100 with $20 budget. Adapted PR #162 techniques (SmearGate, BigramHash, MLP3x, SWA) with hyperparameters tuned for single-GPU training.
note: Artifact slightly exceeds 16MB limit (~2.3% over). Could be resolved with zstd-22 compression. Submitted as non-record to demonstrate 1xH100 feasibility.
